commander.name: The Wise Mothman
commander.oracle_text:
Flying
Whenever The Wise Mothman enters or attacks, each player gets a rad counter.
Whenever one or more nonland cards are milled, put a +1/+1 counter on each of up to X target creatures, where X is the number of nonland cards milled this way.

deck.name: Agent Frank Horrigan
deck.oracle_text:
Trample
Agent Frank Horrigan has indestructible as long as it attacked this turn.
Whenever Agent Frank Horrigan enters or attacks, proliferate twice. (To proliferate, choose any number of permanents and/or players, then give each another counter of each kind already there.)

III — Creatures you control gain deathtouch until end of turn.

deck.name: Find // Finality
deck.oracle_text:
Return up to two target creature cards from your graveyard to your hand.
---
You may put two +1/+1 counters on a creature you control. Then all creatures get -4/-4 until end of turn.

deck.name: Flotsam // Jetsam
deck.oracle_text:
Mill three cards. Investigate. (Create a Clue token. It's an artifact with "{2}, Sacrifice this token: Draw a card.")
---
Each opponent mills three cards, then you may cast a spell from each opponent's graveyard without paying its mana cost. If a spell cast this way would be put into a graveyard, exile it instead.

deck.name: Guardian Project
deck.oracle_text: Whenever a nontoken creature you control enters, if it doesn't have the same name as another creature you control or a creature card in your graveyard, draw a card.

deck.name: Hardened Scales
